MV TURICUM // DWT 58097 MT/ DRAFT : 12.82 M // OPEN IN ALEXANDRIA //  SPOT
NO Goa/Russia/ Ukraine
MV
TURICUM
BUILT: JUNE 2012
YARD: TSUNEISHI GROUP (ZHOUSHAN) SHIPBUILDING INC.
FLAG: SWISS
DWT: 58,097 MT ON 12.826 M SSW
LOA/BEAM: < 190 M / 32.26 M
GRAIN: 72‘689 M3
GRT/NRT: 32’315 / 19’458
HOLDS/HATCHES: 5 / 5
CRANES: 4 X 30 MT SWL DECK CRANES
GRABS: 4 X 12 M3 SMAG ELECTRO HYDRAULIC GRABS
SPEED/CONSUMPTION:
LADEN AT CSO: 14.0 KNOTS ON 32.3 MT IFO PER 24H, INCLUDING AE.
BALLAST AT CSO: 14.5 KNOTS ON 32.3 MT IFO PER 24H, INCLUDING AE.
SLOW SPEED: 11,6 KN BALLAST AND 11,2 KN LADEN AT 22,4 MT IFO
IDLE: 3.0 MT IFO PER 24H.
WORKING: 6.0 MT IFO PER 24H
CONSUMPTION MGO: THE VESSEL RESERVES THE RIGHT TO USE 7 MT/MONTH PRO RATA OF MGO/MDO IN LIEU OF IFO.
SPEED AND CONSUMPTION FIGURES ONLY APPLICABLE IN GOOD WEATHER CONDITIONS UP TO AND INCLUDING MAXIMUM FORCE 4 ON THE BEAUFORT WIND SCALE AND STATE 3 ON THE DOUGLAS SEA SCALE.
SPEED FIGURES GIVEN AS SPEED THROUGH WATER. CONSUMPTION FIGURES NOT APPLICABLE DURING BALLAST WATER EXCHANGE.
ALL CONSUMPTION FIGURES BASED ON A FUEL HEATING VALUE OF AT LEAST 41MJ/KG.
ALL FIGS ALL ABT EXCEPT SLOW SPEED AND CONSUMPTION WHICH TO BE ALWAYS WOG AND REFERENCE ONLY.
